title: Version a chart deliberately with SemVer and appVersion
description: Bump the chart version on any template/values change and appVersion to track the shipped app, so consumers see meaningful upgrades.
body: Use when releasing a new cut of a chart. Do not reuse a chart version after editing templates or conflate chart version with the app version. Actions: bump Chart.yaml version per SemVer (patch for fixes, minor for additive values, major for breaking value/selector changes), set appVersion to the application image tag it deploys, and document breaking changes in the chart's notes. Validation signals include consumers seeing a new version on helm repo update and a major bump accompanying any breaking values change. Risk boundary: shipping a breaking change as a non-major bump misleads operators and should be corrected before publishing.
